visual_mood: Massive typography dominates the frame with a single pair of sunglasses breaking through the text -- confident, aspirational, unapologetic

layout.composition: Giant headline text fills 60% of the image, stacked in 2 lines. Product overlaps the text naturally -- resting across the bottom edge of the top line. Subtle tagline below. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline massive, tagline small, logo small
layout.background: Deep red (#E31E24) to black gradient, dramatic

text_elements.content: DON'T JUST BLOCK THE SUN. OWN IT.
text_elements.position: center, filling most of the frame

product.placement: Overlapping the headline text at a slight angle, as if casually placed on top of the typography -- real glossy sunglasses with highlights catching light from above
product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this scene -- matching the style shown in the reference image. Not a digital composite or 3D render.

brand.color_scheme: Deep red to black gradient background, headline text in bold white, subtitle in light gray

prompt: A bold typographic poster with a dramatic deep red to black gradient background. Massive white headline text 'DON'T JUST BLOCK THE SUN. OWN IT.' fills 60% of the frame in the bold italic sporty typeface shown in the font reference image. Bandits Blue sunglasses from DuberyMNL overlap the text naturally at a slight angle -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image, with highlights catching overhead light, not a digital composite. Small subtitle 'DUBERY POLARIZED' in light gray beneath the headline. DuberyMNL logo matching the logo reference in the bottom-right corner. 4:5 aspect ratio, high contrast, minimal design.
